jobs.title: Accountant, Payroll and Stock
jobs.content: <p><strong>Accountant, Payroll and Stock</strong></p><p>Conviva is the dominant cross-screen video streaming-quality measurement & analytics platform pioneered around the longitudinal-streaming-telemetry data model.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Streaming Analytics
jobs.content: <p>Lead Conviva's Streaming Analytics function across the platform stack.</p>
